messages.content: Brief: Launch headline for a self-serve API observability tool aimed at backend engineers. Must name the audience, lead with the outcome, and stay under 12 words.

request.system: You are a senior copywriter. Read the brief and write ONE product-page headline. Reply with ONLY the headline text — no quotes, no preamble.

response.content: Observability, reimagined for the modern cloud-native era
